name: The Torsa Kurta Set - White
description:
name: The Torsa Kurta Set - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Torsa Kurta Set brings together the Torsa Kurta and Numa Pants in crisp white, designed as an effortless summer pairing.

The kurta is crafted in organic cotton voile with white on white chikankari and mukaish dots on the yoke for delicate texture.

The pants balance the look with airy cotton voile, finished with a blue striped selvedge detail along the side seam.

Completed with subtle red accents and clean craftsmanship, this set blends lightness, ease, and craft in cotton and threadwork.

name: The Rin Top Set - Grey & White Stripes
description:
name: The Rin Top Set - Grey & White Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Rin Top Set pairs the Rin Top with Costa Pants in soft grey and white stripes, clean, crisp, and easy to wear together.

The top is crafted in lyocell linen stripes, finished with an ice blue flower applique placed on the front panel.

The striped pants carry the same graphic rhythm, completed with a grey shell button at the waistband for subtle structure.

Together, the set balances cool tones, breathable texture, and a single crafted accent.

name: The Giri Kurta Set - Blue & White
description:
name: The Giri Kurta Set - Blue & White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Giri Kurta Set pairs the Giri Kurta with the Aven Pants in riverside blues, a fresh coordinated look for warm days.

The kurta features windowpane checks with a chikankari jaali heart on the sleeve and contrast piping at the neckline.

The linen pants arrive in a garment dyed riverside blue, finished with an extended waistband and a button stitched in red thread.

Together, the set balances crisp pattern, breathable fabric, and small signature details.

name: The Rann Shirt Set - Grey & White Stripes
description:
name: The Rann Shirt Set - Grey & White Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Rann Shirt Set brings together the Rann Shirt and Costa Pants in matching grey and white stripes for a clean, graphic statement.

The shirt is crafted in yarn dyed cotton stripes with a red heart block print placed at the back corner as a bold accent.

The pants continue the striped rhythm, finished with a grey shell button at the waistband for subtle polish.

This set is sharp, simple, and designed with just enough contrast to stand out.

name: The Calicut Kurta Set - White
description:
name: The Calicut Kurta Set - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Calicut Kurta Set brings together the Calicut Kurta and Numa Pants in crisp white, elevated through small crafted accents.

The kurta features white on white chikankari, a moon patch in red checks, smocking on the cap sleeves, and a high low hem with charcoal check piping.

The pants are cut in organic cotton voile, finished with a blue striped selvedge running along the side seam.

Clean, light, and detailed up close, this set balances contrast and summer ease.

name: The Dhauli Kurta Set - Grey & White Checks
description:
name: The Dhauli Kurta Set - Grey & White Checks, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Dhauli Kurta Set brings together the Dhauli Kurta and Yoka Trousers in bold charcoal and white checks for a striking coordinated look.

The kurta features all over floral embroidery with red pleating at the back collar and slit sleeves as a modern twist.

The trousers continue the gingham base with bias check patch pockets and a light green heart embroidery at the pocket corner.

Finished with contrast, craft, and clean structure, this set feels sharp yet effortless.

name: The Meadow Kurta Set - Ivory
description:
name: The Meadow Kurta Set - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Meadow Kurta Set pairs the Meadow Kurta with Breeze Pants in soft ivory tones, rich in embroidery and texture.

The kurta is crafted in cotton silk chanderi with all over aari dots and orange chinar leaf embroidery scattered like reflections on water.

The cotton kora pants add a grounded finish, detailed with red boondi dots on the upper panel and a fish motif at the hem.

This set blends luminous fabric, intricate threadwork, and an easy summer palette.

name: The Imke Kurta Set - Multicolour
description:
name: The Imke Kurta Set - Multicolour, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Imke Kurta Set brings together the Imke Kurta and Classic Pyjamas in multicolour prints designed for playful comfort.

Inspired by Kashmiri kani shawls, the kurta’s heart and bird motifs are woven into running stripes, finished with a moon patch in diagonal stripes.

The pyjamas echo the same kani inspired stripe rhythm in airy organic cotton voile with an elasticated back waistband.

Together, the set is light, joyful, and full of movement in print and colour.

name: The Kohima Kaftan Set - Multicolour
description:
name: The Kohima Kaftan Set - Multicolour, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Kohima Kaftan Set pairs the Kohima Kaftan with Numa Pants in crisp whites, designed as an easy summer set with print and detail in balance. 

The kaftan is crafted in organic cotton voile with a placement print of birds and blooming flowers, like a river garden in full colour. 

The pants keep things clean and breathable, finished with a blue striped selvedge running along the side seam as a subtle accent. 

Together, the set blends airy voile comfort, crafted finishing, and a sense of escape in print and texture.

name: The Kiva Set - White & Red Printed

The top features red gulmohar flowers with an ice blue heart centre, finished with frayed edges and a red heart embroidery at the hem corner.

The skirt continues the gulmohar print with a paperbag waistband and a charcoal gingham side drawstring for a cool twist.

Together, the set blends florals, craft, and an easy statement silhouette.

name: THE FABLE SET, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Fable Set brings a soft, composed winter mood — calm, grounded, and quietly expressive in black, white, and charcoal.

The Fable Top is crafted in recycled poly-wool, designed in a loose, effortless silhouette, with a puff flower appliqué and embroidered circle placed at the centre back.

The Weekend Trousers share the same relaxed ease in recycled poly-wool, finished with black-and-charcoal checks and a small red star embroidered at the pocket corner.

description:
name: THE MEMENTO SET, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Memento Set is denim done the easy way — relaxed, lived-in, and quietly detailed, made to feel like an old favourite from the very first wear.

The Memento Kurta is crafted in medium-wash cotton denim with an easy, comfortable silhouette and two subtle heart impressions along the centre-front panels.

The Side Tuck Pants echo the same denim mood, finished with soft tucks for shape and a pixelated heart embroidered at the pocket corner for a small, signature detail.

name: The Kochi Kurta Set - Purple & Gold
description:
name: The Kochi Kurta Set - Purple & Gold, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Elegant in its simplicity, the is set is timeless with minimal detailing and maximum charm. The rich, solid purple base brings depth and versatility, easy to layer and ideal for both festive moments and your everyday. 

The Kochi Kurta is crafted in 100% cotton kora, offering a natural crinkle and breathable comfort. A single round gota flower embroidery adds a delicate focal point—placed on the wearer’s right side.

Bold and full of character, the Darjeeling Pants come in a rich solid purple. With a gently puffy silhouette, these pants offer a playful yet polished look that's easy to dress up or down. Crafted from cotton linter, a natural byproduct of cottonseed oil production, Bemberg is a regenerated cellulose fibre that’s soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. It’s biodegradable, compostable, and made using a closed-loop process that minimises waste, making it a thoughtful choice for you and the planet.

Due to the different fabrics used in both garments, the colour tones may vary.

name: THE TAO STRIPEY SET

name: THE TAO STRIPEY SET, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description:

The Tao Turtle Neck Sweater is knitted in 100% organic cotton yarn, finished with a navy neckline border, a metal heart coin at the hem, and big and small navy dot motifs across the front and back.

The Stripey Pants echo the same red tone, crafted in organic cotton yarn with a relaxed fit, a metal flower coin at the pocket mouth, and a chartreuse heart motif at the bottom hem for a quiet lift of detail.

name: Tab Top - Pink
description:
name: Tab Top - Pink, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Soft shine, easy movement—this one slips on like a thought and lingers like a feeling.

Crafted in metallic onion pink tissue, it’s featherlight with a relaxed fit and finished with a clean baby hem.

At the hem, a checkered heart embroidered in contrast thread adds a quiet flicker of detail.

name: Uma Kaftan - Pink
description:
name: Uma Kaftan - Pink, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Uma Kaftan is light, luminous, and made to move with the day—wherever it may lead.

Crafted in metallic onion pink tissue, the free-size silhouette drapes effortlessly, with clean lines and minimal seams throughout.

A red heart is embroidered at the centre of the left sleeve—subtle, thoughtful, and just enough.

name: Araya Kaftan - Olive & Purple
description:
name: Araya Kaftan - Olive & Purple, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Araya Kaftan is woven from lustrous metallic tissue that shimmers with every movement. Olive and deep purple create a regal palette that is both bold and sophisticated.

Designed with attention to detail, the purple side of the fabric elegantly adorns the wrists, offering a striking contrast. 

A meticulously crafted flower motif is embellished at the sleeve hem, adding a subtle yet captivating sparkle.

Perfect for those who appreciate artful design and luxurious texture, the Araya Kaftan is a statement piece that balances tradition with contemporary style.

name: Collared Kaftan - Green & Silver
description:
name: Collared Kaftan - Green & Silver, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Radiant and statement, this collared kaftan is crafted from shimmering metallic tissue that captures light with every movement.The rich emerald base is beautifully contrasted by deep navy and silver accents, creating a striking interplay of hues.

The second button on the placket is stitched with a bold red thread. The navy side of the fabric features prominently on the wrists, offering a harmonious contrast.

A delicate mukaish rose embroidery graces the center of the blue sleeve hem, adding to its design.

name: Tao Turtle Neck Sweater - Red
description:
name: Tao Turtle Neck Sweater - Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Tao Sweater brings a rich winter red to the season, warm and confident with that effortless, throw-on ease a good turtleneck naturally carries.

Knitted in 100% organic cotton yarn, it’s finished with a navy border at the neckline and a small metal heart coin at the hem for a touch of detail.

Big and small navy dot motifs sit across the front and back, adding a graphic rhythm to this classic cold-weather silhouette.

name: Fable Top - Black & Charcoal
description:
name: Fable Top - Black & Charcoal, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Fable Top leans into an easy winter mood, white and black coming together in a palette that feels calm, clean, and quietly expressive.

Crafted in recycled poly-wool, it’s designed in a loose, effortless silhouette with a puff flower appliqué placed at the centre back.

At its core sits an embroidered circle, a small but thoughtful detail that gives this simple piece a memorable finish.

name: Nova Kurta - Black
description:
name: Nova Kurta - Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Nova Kurta is a refreshing and versatile piece that brings a refined ease to winter, now imagined in a deep solid black with subtle contrast detailing.

Crafted from soft Bemberg, the clean black base lends a timeless, polished mood that fits seamlessly into any wardrobe.

Spot a mulberry heart embroidered at the centre of the moon patch.

With its light, breathable feel and effortless silhouette, the Nova Kurta finds a spot in every wardrobe.

name: Rewa Top - Purple & Silver Checks
description:
name: Rewa Top - Purple & Silver Checks, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Elevate your wardrobe with the Rewa Top, crafted from lustrous metallic tissue that showcases a captivating purple and silver check pattern. The interplay of shimmer and colour makes it perfect for both day and evening wear.

Thoughtful details like red thread faggoting along the armholes add a subtle pop of contrast, while the delicate baby hem brings a refined finish.

At the front waistline, spot a graceful green flower embroidered with zari dots.

name: Knit trousers - Multicolour
description:
name: Knit trousers - Multicolour, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Rib Knit Trousers bring a burst of colour to winter, their multicolour check adding a playful rhythm to an otherwise easy, everyday silhouette.

Knitted in 100% organic cotton yarn, they fall in a soft ribbed fit that feels comfortable and effortless through the day.

Finished in an all-over multicolour check, this pair adds personality without overpowering, making it an easy go-to for the season.

name: Kosi Kaftan - Fuchsia & Lime Printed
description:
name: Kosi Kaftan - Fuchsia & Lime Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Step into effortless elegance with the Kosi Kaftan, a vibrant blend of comfort and bold, botanical beauty. The print is inspired by the richness of the ancient Silk Route, where Indian and Chinese cultures once met. Perfectly lightweight and free-flowing, it’s designed for easy celebrations.

Crafted from 100% organic cotton voile, the airy, sheer fabric drapes beautifully, offering both comfort and effortless elegance.

Subtle cordless piping along the neckline enhances the clean, polished finish, while the delicate baby hem adds a touch of understated sophistication.

Designed in a free size with a loose, flowing silhouette, this kaftan embraces relaxed ease without compromising on style.

name: Kiaan Sweater - Purple & Ivory
description:
name: Kiaan Sweater - Purple & Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Kiaan Sweater stands out with its bold purple base and clean ivory accents, giving a simple sleeveless silhouette a sharp, modern edge.

Knitted in 100% organic cotton yarn, it features colour blocking at the front and back with a subtle heart icon detail.

An ivory and purple circle motif sits at the centre-back neck, adding a small, considered touch to this easy winter layer.

name: Uma Top - Watermelon & Silver Print
description:
name: Uma Top - Watermelon & Silver Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A little shimmer, a lot of ease. This one's made for the days that flow straight into evening.

Printed with silver foil flowers on a juicy watermelon base, the Uma Top pairs festive sparkle with everyday comfort.

Crafted in airy organic cotton voile with lace detailing, it’s designed to move—with you, and with the season.

name: Splice Jacket - Denim
description:
name: Splice Jacket - Denim, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Splice Jacket takes everyday denim into statement territory, mixing blue and navy in a way that feels graphic, contemporary, and unmistakably retro.

Crafted in denim with pining at the armhole for subtle structure, it brings a textured, layered mood to winter dressing.

A mix of embroidered motifs — a Geisha doll stamp, stars, pixelated hearts, and a scattered flower — adds character across the jacket, creating a playful collage of details that catch the eye without overwhelming.

name: Gusset Long Kurta - Green
description:
name: Gusset Long Kurta - Green, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Gusset Long Kurta makes a statement with its efforltess fall and deep green hue, perfect for celebrations.

Made in 100% cotton, offering a breathable, natural feel with a subtle texture that adds depth to the garment.

The silhouette features pockets, an even hemline and is finished with a delicate baby hem. 

A triangle gota detail accents the neckline, adding a subtle festive touch.

On the wearer’s left sleeve, spot a chrysanthemum mirror flower created with real mirror work, to be handled with care.

A delicate ode to India’s traditional shisha embroidery, this piece reimagines the craft with a contemporary twist making it modern Indian.

name: Bramble Top - Black & Fuchsia
description:
name: Bramble Top - Black & Fuchsia, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Bramble Top brings a moody romance to winter, its charcoal-and-pink rose print unfolding softly against a deep black base.

Crafted in fluid Bemberg, it’s finished with a delicate flower appliqué and a tie-up neckline that adds an easy, feminine lift.

A light, expressive piece that moves beautifully and brings a touch of colour to cooler days.

name: Sarai Kaftan - Dark Navy
description:
name: Sarai Kaftan - Dark Navy, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
In a rich dark navy hue, the Sarai Kaftan blends effortless elegance with everyday comfort. This kaftan is perfect for everything from relaxed evenings to festive gatherings.

Crafted from cotton linter, a natural byproduct of cottonseed oil production, Bemberg is a regenerated cellulose fibre that’s soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. It’s biodegradable, compostable, and made using a closed-loop process that minimises waste, making it a thoughtful choice for you and the planet.

Delicate detailing brings it to life—a playful tassel trim with handmade tassels adds movement and charm. 

Spot a fuchsia heart embroidery near the wearer’s left side, offering a pop of colour and a handcrafted finish.

name: Collared Kaftan - Ivory & Charcoal Print
description:
name: Collared Kaftan - Ivory & Charcoal Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Collared Kaftan is crisp, fluid, and quietly expressive—made for days that call for ease with a little edge.

Crafted in organic cotton voile, it features a sharp collar, wide sleeves, and a relaxed fit that drapes just right.

The ivory base is printed with a pixelated pattern and checkered florals in charcoal, scattered playfully across the silhouette to keep things light but intentional.

name: Stripey Pants - Red
description:
name: Stripey Pants - Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Stripey Pants bring a jolt of bright red to winter, a colour that instantly energises and adds a playful lift to everyday dressing.

Knitted in 100% organic cotton yarn, they’re designed in an easy silhouette and finished with a metal flower coin at the pocket mouth.

A chartreuse heart motif sits at the bottom hem, giving this bold pair a small, charming detail.

name: Camber Top - Chocolate Brown & Gold Printed
description:
name: Camber Top - Chocolate Brown & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Camber Top blends classic sophistication with festive warmth, featuring rich chocolate brown and shimmering gold florals that make it perfect for any celebration.

Crafted from cotton-silk chanderi, this top offers a soft, luxurious feel with a subtle sheen. The gold foil floral print on the brown base adds a refined touch of glamour. With a relaxed, free-size fit, the silhouette drapes effortlessly for comfort and style. 

A distinctive detail is the collar button, hand-stitched with vibrant red thread, adding a unique pop of colour. Designed to suit all body types, the loose fit ensures ease and grace for everyday wear or festive occasions.

name: Yoi Hem Pants - Red & Green Printed
description:
name: Yoi Hem Pants - Red & Green Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description:

Crafted from crisp, breathable 100% cotton.

Perfect for pairing with both casual and dressy tops, these pants bring effortless style to your wardrobe.

name: Kannauj Kurta - Fuchsia & Gold Printed
description:
name: Kannauj Kurta - Fuchsia & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Kannauj Kurta is a celebration of vibrant colour and fine detailing. The rich fuchsia base is adorned with tiny gold floral prints, offering a festive yet refined appeal.

Crafted in lustrous cotton-silk Chanderi.

Thoughtful design details elevate its charm: green-threaded buttons at the cuffs add a subtle contrast.

Finished with a baby hem and practical side pockets, this kurta blends elegance with everyday ease—ideal for occasions that call for quiet celebration.

name: Bay Dress - Mulberry
description:
name: Bay Dress - Mulberry, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Bay Dress brings a rich mulberry mood to winter, soft, fluid, and quietly striking in its simplicity.

Crafted in smooth Bemberg, it features a solid mulberry base lifted with subtle contrast trim detailing that adds just the right touch of definition.

An easy, elegant silhouette that moves effortlessly through the day.

name: Calicut Kurta - Mint & Watermelon Print
description:
name: Calicut Kurta - Mint & Watermelon Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Calicut Kurta is all ease and colour—softly structured, with a hint of something festive.
Printed with watermelon-hued roses on a mint cotton voile base, it features relaxed sleeves with delicate smocking that adds gentle shape to the flow.
Light, breathable, and easy to wear, it’s made for warm days and moments that unfold gently.

name: Jaisalmer Shirt with Slip - Charcoal
description:
name: Jaisalmer Shirt with Slip - Charcoal, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Soft light, desert hues, and a breeze that never quite settles—this one feels like golden hour.

Crafted in sheer silk organza in solid charcoal, the shirt features fine French seams, a delicate baby hem, and a hand-tacked concealed placket.

At the front hem, a paan patta motif is embroidered with sequins for a quiet glimmer. Beneath it, the matching charcoal slip is printed with delicate roses and leafy tendrils.

name: High Low Shirt - Mint & Watermelon Print
description:
name: High Low Shirt - Mint & Watermelon Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Cut for ease, with a gentle flow that carries you from morning to evening.

Printed in rosy chintz blooms on mint cotton voile, the high-low hem adds soft movement to a relaxed silhouette.

Buttons stitched with watermelon thread at the placket and cuffs offer a quiet pop—just enough to catch the eye.

name: Twirl Skort - Ivory
description:
name: Twirl Skort - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Twirl Skort brings a breezy winter lightness, all in soft ivory that feels fresh, easy, and quietly playful.

Crafted in lightweight cotton twill, it’s designed with a comfortable skort silhouette that keeps movement effortless.

Finished with practical front pockets, it’s an uncomplicated staple that fits neatly into everyday dressing.

name: Dream High-low Hem Sweater - Purple
description:
name: Dream High-low Hem Sweater - Purple, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Dream Sweater brings a soft winter glow, the kind of effortless purple that feels calm, cosy, and instantly comforting.

Made in 100% organic cotton yarn, it’s finished with a subtle high-low hem and a crisp red border that adds just the right pop of colour.

Pixelated chartreuse hearts sit at the front, giving this easy essential a quiet touch of character.

name: Scoop Back Dress - Mint & Watermelon Print
description:
name: Scoop Back Dress - Mint & Watermelon Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Scoop Back Dress makes its entrance softly—bold in print, fluid in form.

Set against a mint base and made in Bemberg, the watermelon rose chintz adds colour and contrast, while the open back and smocking offer ease without losing shape.

Striped fabric trims the tie-ups and hem, adding a playful touch to the silhouette, while layered flower tassels at the tie ends and no centre seams keep the flow uninterrupted.

Crafted from cotton linter, a natural byproduct of cottonseed oil production, Bemberg is a regenerated cellulose fibre that’s soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. It’s biodegradable, compostable, and made using a closed-loop process that minimises waste, making it a thoughtful choice for you and the planet.

name: Tapi Kaftan - Red
description:
name: Tapi Kaftan - Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description:

Crafted from cotton linter, a natural byproduct of cottonseed oil production, Bemberg is a regenerated cellulose fibre that’s soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. It’s biodegradable, compostable, and made using a closed-loop process that minimises waste, making it a thoughtful choice for you and the planet.

Designed with side pockets in matching shell fabric and finished with a clean baby hem, it's as functional as it is flattering.

Delicate ivory and green rose embroidery adds a handcrafted touch, placed along the center pleats—two on the front and two on the back. Each motif is mirrored perfectly on either side of the center front and back seams, creating a sense of balance and symmetry.

name: Amaya Kurta - Ivory Hand Embroidered
description:
name: Amaya Kurta - Ivory Hand Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A dreamy collection infused with heritage and opulence, the hand embroidered Amaya Kurta features delicate poppies against an ivory base.

The kurta floats lighter than air, crafted in buttery chanderi.

The soft, neutral palette of ivory accentuates the intricate craftsmanship of the embroidery, creating a harmonious interplay of texture and tone.

The side strings feature delicate tassel details.

The 4th season of the ‘Aparna Chandra for Nicobar’ line is luxe, limited edition, and rooted in India’s craft traditions.

Som (सोम) is named after the nectar of the gods and over 40 hours of meticulous hand-work and craftsmanship have gone into creating this garment.

name: Afra Shirt - Ivory Hand Embroidered
description:
name: Afra Shirt - Ivory Hand Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A dreamy collection infused with heritage and opulence, the free-flowing Afra Shirt features hand embroidered poppies all over in ethereal ivory.

The sheer shirt floats lighter than air, crafted in 100% crisp silk organza. 

The soft, neutral palette of ivory accentuates the intricate craftsmanship of the embroidery, creating a harmonious interplay of texture and tone.

The concealed placket has hand tacking details which adds to the shirt's design.

The 4th season of the ‘Aparna Chandra for Nicobar’ line is luxe, limited edition, and rooted in India’s craft traditions.

Som (सोम) is named after the nectar of the gods and over 20 hours of meticulous hand-work and craftsmanship have gone into creating this garment.

name: V-Neck Strappy Dress - Watermelon & Silver Print
description:
name: V-Neck Strappy Dress - Watermelon & Silver Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The V-Neck Strappy Dress flows like a slow sunny day—light, festive, and made to move with you.

Printed with silver foil flowers on a vibrant watermelon base, it’s crafted in organic cotton voile with soft checked straps, a clean neckline, and discreet pockets that don’t add bulk.

The relaxed silhouette slips on easy, whether worn solo or layered under something sheer.

name: Pounce Sweater - Ivory & Purple
description:
name: Pounce Sweater - Ivory & Purple, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Pounce Sweater strikes a bold contrast, pairing ivory and purple in a colour-blocked palette that feels crisp, confident, and distinctly Retro.

Knitted in 100% organic cotton yarn, it features clean contrast borders and a purple tiger motif prowling across the left front and back, finished with our signature Nicobar star at the back.

An easy winter layer that adds attitude to everyday dressing, whether you throw it over denim, dresses, or your go-to cold-weather staples.

name: Vellore Capris - Navy
description:
name: Vellore Capris - Navy, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Clean lines, cropped length, and built for the road—these capris are ready for every leg of your journey. Blending the calm of the desert with the wild spirit of the jungle, Safar is a collection designed for exploration—capturing the journey within, before it even begins.

Cut in solid navy cotton with multiple pockets to stow away trail finds and travel bits.

Marked with a travel tent stamp at the right hem, a quiet nod to life on the move.

name: Botanik Jacket - Ivory & Fuchsia
description:
name: Botanik Jacket - Ivory & Fuchsia, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Botanik Jacket brings a sculpted, almost petal-like mood to winter, all in soft ivory with touches of fuchsia that feel fresh and uplifting.

Crafted in smooth Bemberg, it features all-over flower-shaped quilting that gives the silhouette texture and quiet volume.

Each quilted flower on the sleeves is finished with a fuchsia-embroidered centre, adding a refined burst of colour to this standout layer.

name: Banko V-Neck Kurta - Watermelon & Ivory Embroidered
description:
name: Banko V-Neck Kurta - Watermelon & Ivory Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Banko Kurta is all contrast and clarity—vivid in colour, refined in detail.

Cut in deep watermelon pink cotton kora, it features ivory placement embroidery at the neckline and cuffs along with all over embroidery, with subtle silver sequin highlights that catch the light just enough.

Finished with a sharp V-neck and full sleeves, it brings colour, clarity, and ease into perfect balance.

name: Short Sleeve Kurta - Black
description:
name: Short Sleeve Kurta - Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 A well cut solid kurta is a wardrobe essential, and Nicobar’s Short Sleeve kurta pairs equally well with cigarette trousers or your regular blue jeans. This one is in solid black.


 Crafted in cupro modal, the Short Sleeve Kurta has a regular fit. 

 The Short Sleeve Kurta comes with pockets. 

 You’ll find a magenta heart embroidered below the neckline.

name: Talas Kurta - Red & Green Printed
description:
name: Talas Kurta - Red & Green Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Playful yet poised, the Talas Kurta's green base is dotted with medium red prints, creating a vibrant, eye-catching pattern that’s perfect for transitional dressing.

Crafted in 100% organic cotton voile for a light, breathable feel.

A delicate round gota flower motif sits at the center of the wearer’s left sleeve—gold zari stem, a chartreuse sequin center, and a red bead bring a handcrafted charm to the design.

Finished with a baby hem and functional side seam pockets, this kurta pairs everyday comfort with thoughtful detail, making it ideal for both relaxed and festive occasions.

name: Rayna Dress - White Embroidery
description:
name: Rayna Dress - White Embroidery, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Rayna Dress is a beautifully crafted, multi-textured piece that exudes timeless elegance. Made from 100% organic cotton and cotton kota, the dress features a combination of fabrics, each panel featuring its own unique embroidery. 

Delicate flower and leaf motifs are embroidered across the panels, creating a harmonious contrast of textures and patterns.

The embroidered buttonhole adds a subtle yet intricate detail to the design, elevating the overall look.

With its mix of fabrics and thoughtful details, this dress is a sophisticated blend of craftsmanship and feminine charm.

The Miya Button Front Dress & Slip is a vibrant and feminine piece that blends bold color with thoughtful design. Made from 100% yarn-dyed cotton in a solid pink, this dress features a button-front design and a gathered waist for a flattering, comfortable fit. 

The Madras checks slip trimmed with pink lace, adds an extra layer of charm and a playful contrast. 
%Spot a white elephant embroidery for an added touch of whimsy.

Perfect for those who love a balance of bold color and intricate details, this fit and flare dress is versatile enough for day-to-night styling.

name: Uneven Hem Pants - Mulberry
description:
name: Uneven Hem Pants - Mulberry, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Uneven Hem Pants bring a rich mulberry mood to winter, a colour that feels deep, elegant, and instantly expressive.

Crafted in fluid Bemberg, they feature a flared silhouette with an uneven bottom hem that adds gentle movement and a touch of lift.

A small green heart embroidery sits at the corner of the right pocket, giving this easy pair a quiet, memorable detail.

name: Short Sleeve Kurta - Black
description:
name: Short Sleeve Kurta - Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A well-cut solid kurta is a wardrobe essential, and Nicobar’s Short Sleeve Kurta pairs equally well with cigarette trousers or your regular blue jeans.

The black hue and relaxed cut makes it easy to pair with any outfit, adding a touch of effortless style to your look.

Comes with handy pockets. Don't miss the classic heart embroidery at the back.

Pair with our Basic Pyjamas and sneakers or open-toed sandals for a casual look perfect for any weather.

name: Enya Kurta - White Embroidery
description:
name: Enya Kurta - White Embroidery, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Enya Kurta is an effortlessly elegant piece that combines relaxed styling with intricate design. Made from a blend of 100% organic cotton and cotton kota, this kurta features a loose fit, making it perfect for all-day comfort. 

The panelled design showcases a mix of fabrics, creating a visually interesting structure. Each panel is thoughtfully embroidered with a combination of delicate motifs, adding texture throughout the piece. 

With its refined yet relaxed aesthetic, the Enya Kurta is perfect for those who appreciate subtle details that elevate their everyday.

name: Afsar Skirt - Black & Gold Printed
description:
name: Afsar Skirt - Black & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Afsar Skirt features a striking gold square foil print on a deep black base. Lightweight yet rich in detail, it brings an effortless sense of occasion to everyday wear.

Crafted in 100% organic cotton voile.

Thoughtful touches include pockets and a drawstring waistband for ease and flexibility.

The look is finished with Handcrafted long black and gold tassels at the ends of the drawstring—adding movement and a hint of festive shimmer.

name: Rainy Season Dress - Charcoal & White Stripes
description:
name: Rainy Season Dress - Charcoal & White Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Rainy Season Dress in our signature charcoal and white stripes is a blend of bold design and effortless elegance. Made from 100% yarn-dyed cotton, the dress features a combination of thick and thin stripes in charcoal and white, creating a dynamic, layered look. 

The different directional panels of stripes add a playful twist, enhancing the visual interest of the piece. 

A delicate bullion knot rose embroidery at the right bodice corner offers a soft contrast to the graphic stripes. 

Dress this piece up or down for effortless style to throw on and go.

name: Chaand Kurta - Red
description:
name: Chaand Kurta - Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Chaand Kurta shines in a rich solid red, offering a fluid drape with a soft sheen. The fabric lends itself beautifully to both everyday elegance and festive dressing.

Crafted in viscose silk.

Ivory boondi stitch detailing runs along the side seams and sleeve seams, adding subtle contrast. Functional pockets are placed discreetly along the side seams.

An ivory bird embroidery sits on the wearer’s right front, adding a delicate visual accent. 

At the back, spot a bold heart mirror, criss-cross stitched in red and outlined in green created with real mirror work, to be handled with care.

A delicate ode to India’s traditional shisha embroidery, this piece reimagines the craft with a contemporary twist making it modern Indian.

name: Rib knit trousers - Ivory
description:
name: Rib knit trousers - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Rib Knit Trousers bring a calm winter ease, all in ivory with a softness that makes them an instant everyday favourite.

Knitted in 100% organic cotton yarn, they fall in a comfortable ribbed silhouette and are finished with a fuchsia border at the hem.

A small flower motif sits at the bottom, adding a gentle touch of detail to this understated pair.

name: Serene Pants - Black & Beige Printed
description:
name: Serene Pants - Black & Beige Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Elevate your style effortlessly with the most versatile addition to your wardrobe — a pair of pants that seamlessly complement any look, whether dressed up or dressed down.

Form meets function with two convenient patch pockets in the front, offering both practicality and a hint of flair.

Adding a thoughtful detail, a delicate rose embroidery sits on the corner of the right pocket, giving the design a subtle and distinctive finish.

Crafted in Bemberg and printed with black-and-beige stripes, they pair effortlessly with a variety of tops and accessories, making them a timeless, easy favourite in your wardrobe.

name: Muse Sweater - Navy
description:
name: Muse Sweater - Navy, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Muse Sweater brings that unmistakable winter mood — cool, collected, and just a little bit romantic, the kind that makes you want to linger in it all season.

Knitted in 100% organic cotton yarn, it’s detailed with two bold ivory flowers on each sleeve and finished with a tiny metal heart coin at the hem, a quiet but clever signature.

A comfortable winter staple that elevates the everyday, easy to slip on with denim, dresses, and everything in between.

name: Hampi Top - Chartreuse
description:
name: Hampi Top - Chartreuse, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Comfy, glowing and in a relaxed silhouette, the Hampi Top in chartreuse is a versatile celebration piece.Blending artisanal detailing with an easy fit, it effortlessly bridges everyday ease and occasion dressing. 

Crafted in a luxurious mashru, the fabric offers a gentle sheen with a fluid, soft drape, ideal for transitional weather and festive layering. 

High side slits reveal a playful peek of printed facing, a hidden detail that turns a simple motion into a moment of magic.

Tailored with clean lines and minimal seams, the top features thoughtfully finished facings and a moonpatch, all blind-hemmed for an understated, seamless finish. 

Spot a delicate gold sequin star, accented with petite purple sequins and a single purple bead, hand-embroidered on the wearer’s right sleeve. This subtle embellishment adds a touch of whimsy and sparkle, capturing the spirit of celebration.

name: Ayat Pyjamas - Turmeric Yellow
description:
name: Ayat Pyjamas - Turmeric Yellow, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Ayat Pyjamas bring colour to the everyday—rooted, radiant, and easy to move in.

Crafted in 100% cotton in solid turmeric yellow, they’re finished with silver triangle gota along the side slit for a subtle festive edge.

A small red paan patta is embroidered on the leg panel—quiet detail, placed just so.

name: Side Tuck Pants - Denim
description:
name: Side Tuck Pants - Denim, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Side Tuck Pants bring that easy, lived-in denim mood to winter, the kind of blue that feels familiar, relaxed, and endlessly wearable.

Crafted in medium-wash cotton denim, they’re designed with subtle side tucks that give the silhouette a gentle shape and an everyday ease.

A pixelated heart embroidery at the pocket corner adds a small, signature touch to this all-season staple.

name: Salem Pants - Fuchsia & Gold Printed
description:
name: Salem Pants - Fuchsia & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Bold and full of character, the Salem Pants come in fuchsia and gold. With a gently puffy silhouette, these pants offer a playful yet polished look that's easy to dress up or down.

Crafted from cotton linter, a natural byproduct of cottonseed oil production, Bemberg is a regenerated cellulose fibre that’s soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. It’s biodegradable, compostable, and made using a closed-loop process that minimises waste, making it a thoughtful choice for you and the planet.

Functional details include pockets and a relaxed fit for all-day comfort.

Spot a Mashru heart patch on wearer’s left side seam just above the hem—subtle, yet statement-making.

Perfect for festive pairings or as a standout everyday piece, style it with a simple top and flats for effortless charm.

name: Paperbag Pants - Green
description:
name: Paperbag Pants - Green, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Comfort meets style with our classic Paperbag Waist Pants.These pants come in a vibrant bright green that adds energy to any outfit. 

Crafted from cotton linter, a natural byproduct of cottonseed oil production, Bemberg is a regenerated cellulose fibre that’s soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. It’s biodegradable, compostable, and made using a closed-loop process that minimises waste, making it a thoughtful choice for you and the planet.

The high-waisted silhouette features gathered detailing with pockets for a seamless finish.

Find a heart-shaped mirror embroidered at the hem, to be handled with care.

A delicate ode to India’s traditional shisha embroidery, this piece reimagines the craft with a contemporary twist making it modern Indian.

name: Fit & Flare Angrakha - Ivory Embroidered
description:
name: Fit & Flare Angrakha - Ivory Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Fit & Flare Angrakha is light, textured, and quietly festive—made for days that carry a rhythm of their own.

Crafted in breathable cotton kora, it’s embroidered all over with tonal florals, with criss-cross detailing on the back panel and delicate leaf motifs at the neckline.

The flared silhouette adds movement, while the clean finish keeps it grounded in ease.

name: Areca Pants - Charcoal & Ivory Stripes
description:
name: Areca Pants - Charcoal & Ivory Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Areca Pants are made for days when ease and intention go hand in hand.

Crafted in 100% cotton voile with charcoal and ivory shibori stripes, the mid-rise silhouette features a straight leg and side pockets for everyday function.

A small watermelon heart is embroidered just below the pocket—an unexpected detail that makes them distinctly yours.

Shibori is a hand-dyed technique—each piece will vary slightly in pattern and tone, making it one of a kind.

name: Ren Top - White Print
description:
name: Ren Top - White Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Ren Top in white is a breezy addition to any wardrobe, crafted from 100% organic cotton for a lightweight, breathable feel. Soft clouds float across it while the inside features contrasting aqua stripes.

Spot a delicate bullion knot rose embroidery at the side.

Dress this piece up or down for effortless style to throw on and go.

name: Tropico Shirt - Green Printed
description:
name: Tropico Shirt - Green Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Tropico Shirt comes in a cool, camouflaged print, perfect for safaris. Blending the calm of the desert with the wild spirit of the jungle, Safar is a collection designed for exploration—capturing the journey within, before it even begins.

Crafted from light cotton cambri. 

Delightful details abound: signature Nicobar animals and lush motifs scattered all over.

Great for heading on safari or a trip to the jungle.

name: Gusset Long Kurta - Red
description:
name: Gusset Long Kurta - Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Gusset Long Kurta makes a statement with its efforltess fall and red hue.

The full sleeves, V-neck and gathers make this one a head-turner, all with twinkling details.

Crafted in light cotton, dress this piece up or down for your everyday or celebrations alike.

Spot a gold- foiled moon at the right sleeve and antique gold gota triangles at the neckline.

name: Gusset Round Neck Kurta - Deep Green Embroidered
description:
name: Gusset Round Neck Kurta - Deep Green Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Gusset Round Neck Kurta makes a statement with its effortless fall and green hue.

The full sleeves, round neck and gathers make this one a head-turner, all with twinkling details.

Crafted in light cotton, dress this piece up or down for your everyday or celebrations alike.

The design features buttons stitched with red thread, a gold metal flower embroidered neckline with shell fabric piping and red corded embroidery at the sleeve hem.

Spot gold sequin lines embroidered with red thread on the sleeve bicep and a tassel detail attached to the button loop at the back.

name: V-Neck Strappy Dress - White & Purple Printed
description:
name: V-Neck Strappy Dress - White & Purple Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Light as a tropical breeze, the Neck Strappy Dress is made for sun-soaked days and spontaneous escapes. It features an all-over floral parrot print that brings a playful rhythm to the silhouette.

Crafted in soft, 100% organic cotton voile.

The contrast comes alive in the details—chartreuse binding at the hem and purple check straps add unexpected charm.

Cut in a relaxed A-line fit, it flatters while keeping things effortlessly cool.

Easy to slip into, hard to forget—this is carefree summer dressing at its best.

name: Vintage Camisole - White & Fuchsia Print
description:
name: Vintage Camisole - White & Fuchsia Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Vintage Camisole is crafted from 100% organic cotton, featuring a delicate ditsy rose print on a crisp white base. 

The soft, breathable fabric ensures comfort, while the lace detailing along the neckline and hemline adds a feminine, vintage touch. 

Perfect for layering or wearing on its own, this camisole offers a blend of classic charm and modern sustainability.

name: Basic Long Length Kurta - Black & Beige Printed
description:
name: Basic Long Length Kurta - Black & Beige Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
This easy-wearing kurta falls below the knee, and with its body-skimming fit, it pairs perfectly with pyjamas or a pair of jeans.

The black-and-beige striped print and relaxed cut make it easy to pair with any outfit, adding a touch of effortless style to your look. Find a mulberry heart under the placket and all-over rose embroidery that brings soft texture to the silhouette.

Designed with stripes running across the surface, it offers a subtle play of pattern through the day.

name: Basic Mid Length Kurta - Chartreuse & Gold Printed
description:
name: Basic Mid Length Kurta - Chartreuse & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
This easy-wearing kurta falls above the knee, and with its body-skimming fit, it pairs perfectly with pyjamas or a pair of jeans. The chartreuse base is brought to life with a delicate gold palm print, adding a subtle festive sparkle.

Bright, breezy, and effortlessly elegant, this mid-length kurta is crafted from 100% organic cotton voile for all-day comfort.

Spot a diagonal gold gota detail tucked under the placket, catching light with every movement.

name: Vestige Kurta - Ivory
description:
name: Vestige Kurta - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Vestige Kurta brings a quiet, understated elegance to winter in a soft ivory that feels light, gentle, and effortlessly timeless.

Crafted in lightweight cotton twill, it’s finished with subtle piping along the back yoke for a clean, refined touch.

A single flower appliqué sits at the centre back, adding a small moment of detail to this easy everyday kurta.

name: Serene Pants - Ivory & Charcoal Print
description:
name: Serene Pants - Ivory & Charcoal Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Elevate your style effortlessly with the most versatile addition to your wardrobe – a pair of pants that seamlessly complement any look, whether dressed up or dressed down.

Form meets function, these pants feature two convenient patch pockets in the front, providing both practicality and a touch of flair.

Adding a delightful detail, they are beautifully adorned with red heart embroidery on the bottom corner of the pocket, lending a charming and unique element to the overall design.

Crafted in Bemberg and printed with charcoal stripes on an ivory base, they effortlessly pair with a variety of tops and accessories, making them a timeless and essential piece in your wardrobe.

Crafted from cotton linter, a natural byproduct of cottonseed oil production, Bemberg is a regenerated cellulose fibre that’s soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. It’s biodegradable, compostable, and made using a closed-loop process that minimises waste, making it a thoughtful choice for you and the planet.

name: Bolt Jumpsuit - Denim
description:
name: Bolt Jumpsuit - Denim, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Bolt Jumpsuit brings a fresh, easy energy to winter denim, the kind of piece that feels pulled-together without trying too hard.

Crafted in our signature blue denim, it’s designed with a relaxed, everyday silhouette that moves with you.

A heart-shaped patch pocket at the front and a subtle heart impression at the back add a playful signature to this all-season staple.

name: Yin Yan Dress - Charcoal & White Print
description:
name: Yin Yan Dress - Charcoal & White Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Yin Yan Dress plays with duality—striped up top, checked at the hem, and finished with an offbeat asymmetrical edge.

Constructed using two joined circles, it brings the yin and yang concept to life—balancing contrast through form and print.

In charcoal and white with a hand-drawn feel, it’s made for days when you want your outfit to do the talking.

A red pixelated heart at the back finishes the look.

name: V-Neck Flared Kurta - Mint & Silver Print
description:
name: V-Neck Flared Kurta - Mint & Silver Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The V-Neck Flared Kurta brings a quiet gleam to everyday dressing—festive, but never loud.

Printed with silver foil florals on a mint Chanderi base, the silhouette flares gently for ease and movement, without added volume.

The light sheen adds just enough celebration to carry you through the season.

name: Yoka Trousers - Charcoal
description:
name: Yoka Trousers - Charcoal, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Pocket full of personality! Our solid charcoal Yoka Trousers are an easy pick for a flared fit and to amp up your outfit.

Keep your essentials close at hand with the practical pocket design.

In soft cotton-linen, these pants will leave you feeling light as air.

A red heart is embroidered at the corner of the pocket—just a little something extra.

name: Lyla Top - Berry & Grey Stripes
description:
name: Lyla Top - Berry & Grey Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Lyla Top in grey and berry stripes is crafted from 100% cotton thin single jersey offering a soft and breathable fit.

The top features a stylish combination of berry and grey stripes, adding a cool touch to your wardrobe. 

A subtle paw print in rust at the WRS bottom corner completes the look, making this piece both comfortable and effortlessly chic.

name: Lyla Top - Olive & Grey Stripes
description:
name: Lyla Top - Olive & Grey Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Lyla Top in grey and olive stripes is crafted from 100% cotton thin single jersey offering a soft and breathable fit.

The top features a stylish combination of olive and grey stripes, adding a cool touch to your wardrobe. 

A subtle paw print in rust at the WRS bottom corner completes the look, making this piece both comfortable and effortlessly chic.

name: Sahara Skirt - Purple & Gold
description:
name: Sahara Skirt - Purple & Gold, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A celebration of craft and colour, the Sahara Skirt is designed to bring festive flair to any occasion. Whether you're dressing up for a gathering or adding a touch of tradition to everyday moments, this skirt captures the spirit of celebration.

Crafted in crisp 100% cotton in a rich, regal purple, it’s finished with a striking golden gota border that catches the light with every step.

The skirt is lined.

Delicate handcrafted fabric flower tassels—one green, one fuchsia—hang from the drawstring ends, each accented with a sequin for just a hint of sparkle.

Comes with pockets.

name: Aurora Dress with Slip - Turmeric Yellow
description:
name: Aurora Dress with Slip - Turmeric Yellow, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Aurora Dress is sunlit ease, cut in a colour that holds warmth and light in equal measure.

Crafted in breathable cotton kora, it’s layered over a multi-colour check slip trimmed with thin watermelon crochet lace at the neckline and hem.

The play continues with contrast trims at the cuffs, inside placket, and back yoke piping—small surprises that make this one extra special.

A foil-printed flower glints at the back—silver petals with a watermelon centre—placed just where the sun might catch it.

name: Longline Kimono - Ivory
description:
name: Longline Kimono - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
In a breezy fabric, this kimono has effortless style written all over it: T-shaped, front wrapping, with square sleeves that are super airy.

Crafted in soft cotton jacquard, it has an open fall and an adjustable belt. 

Comes in a classic palette, and the heart prints uplift the entire look.

name: Panaji Top - Red
description:
name: Panaji Top - Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Panaji Top is a wardrobe essential with a touch of quiet romance. Its rich red hue offers a sophisticated base, while subtle details elevate the silhouette.

Crafted from cotton linter, a natural byproduct of cottonseed oil production, Bemberg is a regenerated cellulose fibre that’s soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. It’s biodegradable, compostable, and made using a closed-loop process that minimises waste, making it a thoughtful choice for you and the planet.

A signature rose icon is delicately embroidered at the sleeve slits—red blooms with green leaves, mirrored perfectly on each side for visual harmony.

name: Classic Pyjamas - Ivory & Fuchsia Embroidered
description:
name: Classic Pyjamas - Ivory & Fuchsia Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Nicobar’s Classic Pyjamas pair well with your basics and are the definition of comfort in a classic shade ivory with fuchsia embroidery.

Crafted in cotton, this is a must-have pair for your wardrobe.
Effortlessly breezy, these flared pants will leave you feeling light as air.

name: Novel Narrow Pants - Green Printed
description:
name: Novel Narrow Pants - Green Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Novel Narrow Pants feature a soft green base adorned with delicate pink vintage floral prints—bringing a hint of nostalgia to everyday dressing.

Crafted in lightweight 100% organic cotton voile.

Designed with a streamlined narrow fit and functional pockets, these pants offer both comfort and ease.

name: Lantern Top - Fuchsia & Lime Printed
description:
name: Lantern Top - Fuchsia & Lime Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Bright and breezy, the Lantern Top in vibrant fuchsia brings a fresh, joyful energy to your festive wardrobe. Its playful lime abstract floral print adds a modern twist to classic silhouettes.

Made from 100% organic cotton voile, this top is lightweight and breathable.

Featuring a clean baby hem with an A-line silhouette, the Lantern Top offers a flattering, easy fit that flows gracefully.

Intricate check piping traces the pocket mouth, adding a subtle nod to detail.

name: Basic Pyjamas - Mint & Watermelon Print
description:
name: Basic Pyjamas - Mint & Watermelon Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A style that's come to be our signature, this pyjama features an A-line silhouette that ends in a gentle flare.

The mint base is printed with a ditsy rose chintz, bringing in a soft, playful touch.

Crafted in 100% organic cotton voile, it pairs perfectly with kurtas and shirts alike, and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet..

name: Waterfall Shirt - Black
description:
name: Waterfall Shirt - Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A modern take on your everyday black shirt featuring an edgy back-tie detail, the Waterfall Shirt’s back panel steals the show with its checked pattern, making a statement as you walk away.

A fuchsia heart embroidery is placed inside the placket, between the 2nd and 3rd buttons.This subtle yet striking detail adds a unique touch to the garment’s design.

Dress this piece up or down for effortless style to throw on and go.

Due to the uneven checks and colours of the fabric, each back tie will vary slightly, adding to the unique beauty of this style.

name: Basic Pyjama - Black & Mulberry Printed
description:
name: Basic Pyjama - Black & Mulberry Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Basic Pyjamas take on a new rhythm this season, reimagined in a striking black-and-mulberry print that feels bold, fluid, and unmistakably festive.

Crafted in soft, lightweight Bemberg, the silhouette stays true to its easy flared fit while the all-over floral print brings a touch of drama to the mix.

Contrast palm flowers bloom across the surface, adding movement and character to a pair designed to work effortlessly with kurtas, shirts, and every look you’re putting together.

name: Pattaya Kurta with Slip - Watermelon
description:
name: Pattaya Kurta with Slip - Watermelon, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Pattaya Kurta is fresh and full of quiet detail—made for moments that feel unhurried.

Crafted in yarn-dyed cotton-silk checks in watermelon and white, it’s paired with a tonal slip trimmed in ivory crochet lace at the neckline and hem.

A mint heart is embroidered at the sleeve hem, just beside the cuff pleat—small, intentional, and easy to miss (but never forget).

name: Vintage Camisole - Fuchsia & Gold Printed
description:
name: Vintage Camisole - Fuchsia & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
This vintage-inspired adjustable camisole offers lightweight comfort with a delicate drape. The soft fuchsia base is adorned with tiny gold floral prints, adding a subtle shimmer that feels both timeless and elegant. 

Made from 100% organic cotton voile.

Perfect for layering or wearing on its own, it brings effortless charm to your everyday wardrobe.

name: Hampi Top - Ivory
description:
name: Hampi Top - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description:

Crafted in a luxurious cotton-viscose mashru, the fabric offers a gentle sheen with a fluid, soft drape, ideal for transitional weather and festive layering. Its breathable yet refined texture adds depth to the saturated colour.

name: Front Pleated Kurta - Charcoal & Watermelon Print

name: Front Pleated Kurta - Charcoal & Watermelon Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Front Pleated Kurta is all contrast and calm—graphic, grounded, and made to move with you.

Printed with watermelon peonies on a deep charcoal Chanderi base, it’s finished with mint-thread buttons at each cuff and a silver zari heart embroidered at the centre back.

With a straight, relaxed silhouette and subtle side slits, it’s an easy pick for days that ask for quiet celebration.

name: Tribe Dress - Red & Green Printed
description:
name: Tribe Dress - Red & Green Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Tribe Dress features a playful green base dotted with medium red prints—lightweight, breathable, and perfect for everyday ease. A standout piece that’s ideal for your everyday and light celebrations.

Crafted in 100% organic cotton voile.

Designed with side pockets in matching shell fabric and finished with a neat baby hem, this dress combines comfort with subtle detailing.

Spot a green Mashru heart patch adds a touch of handcrafted charm, placed on the wearer’s right side of the skirt.

name: Basic Long Length Kurta - Ivory
description:
name: Basic Long Length Kurta - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
This easy-wearing kurta falls below the knee, woven with a floral ivory buta all over in a neutral shade of ivory.

Crafted in sumtous cotton silk, the relaxed cut makes it easy to pair with any outfit, adding a touch of effortless style to your look.

name: Calicut Top - White & Purple Printed
description:
name: Calicut Top - White & Purple Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description:
